title: Phase II study of retifanlimab in patients with recurrent locally advanced or metastatic Merkel cell carcinoma (POD1UM-201).
abstract: POD1UM-201, an open-label, single-arm, phase II multiregional study, evaluated efficacy and tolerability of retifanlimab, a humanized monoclonal antibody targeting programmed cell death protein-1 (PD-1) in chemotherapy-naive patients with recurrent locally advanced or metastatic Merkel cell carcinoma (MCC).
